title: Spurious MULTIDRIVEN warnings with -fno-inline on cell output port connections

features.name: multiple cell instances driving shared wire via output ports
features.description: Code should include multiple cell instances with output ports connected to the same wire, where each instance drives the wire through its output port connection

features.name: coverage toggle point with inlining control
features.description: Code should include coverage toggle instrumentation with -fno-inline flag affecting how cell instances are processed
